USAGE:
    SchemaTypist.Cli.dll generate [DATABASE_VENDOR] [ROOT_OUTPUT_DIR] [
CONNECTION_STRING] [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    [DATABASE_VENDOR]      MicrosoftSqlServer or PostgreSql           
    [ROOT_OUTPUT_DIR]                                                 
    [CONNECTION_STRING]    Static connection string to source database

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                            Prints help information               
    -e, --entities-only                   Use this option to generate domain    
                                          model objects only                    
        --entities-output-dir                                                   
        --entities-custom-namespace                                             
        --entity-name-suffix                                                    
    -p, --persistence-only                Use this option to generate data      
                                          access layer only.  Remember,         
                                          persistence code references entities  
        --persistence-output-dir                                                
        --persistence-custom-namespace                                          
        --mapping-name-suffix                                                   
        --root-namespace                                                        
        --include                                                               
        --exclude                                                               
        --create-immutable-entities                                             
        --create-record-entities                                                
        --user-secrets-id                                                       
        --strip-prefix                                                          
        --strip-suffix                                                          
        --target-lang-version             This can be set to 'CSharp7_3' and    
                                          'Default'.  Default caters for        
                                          CSharp10 and beyond                   
        --use-nullable-ref-types          Nullable ref types are supported      
        --use-sql-default-value           Should properties be auto-initialized 
                                          with default values defined in DDL?
